---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an addition or improvement
labels: enhancement
---

## What problem does this solve?

Describe the use case. What are you trying to do that you can't do today?

## Proposed solution

How would you like it to work? API shape, config field, behavior change — whatever is relevant.

## Alternatives considered

Any other approaches you thought about?

## Notes

Anything else — related issues, prior art, constraints.
